title: campanula lingulata
intro: Campanula lingulata, also known as the lingulate bellflower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Campanula lingulata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Campanula lingulata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
